text: Huge backlog of assignments from other sessions of the course that are waiting for peer reviews makes it very difficult to get your own assignment peer reviewed , even if you submit before deadline . Course content is not substantiated with research . Assignment instructions and grading criteria are badly misaligned , which is probably why there is such a big backlog of old assignments from earlier sessions . The person responsible for the course should take the following actions : 1 ) Aligning the grading criteria with the assignment instructions2 ) Clearing out the backlog of assignments that have not yet been peer reviewed . I estimate that there are 50 - 100 still pending review , many were submitted almost one year ago .
